HD.rationale: HD trades at 26.4x P/E near the high end of its 21.5-29.3x range while Q3 revenue declined sequentially (40.22B vs 43.17B prior quarter) and the stock has pulled back 5.4% over 3 months, suggesting modest upside if housing demand stabilizes but limited margin of safety at current multiples.

Q3 revenue 40.22B declined from Q2 43.17B, showing demand softness
Stock down 5.4% over 3 months but up 12.7% over 1 year
Net margin compressed to 9.5% with operating margin 13.7%
News sentiment broadly positive (+0.67 to +1.00) but mostly generic bullish coverage

CAT.rationale: CAT's mid-range PE (~16x) and elite profitability (ROE 56%, op margin 20%) combined with an 8% pullback against uniformly positive news sentiment make risk-adjusted reward mildly attractive over a year.

3-month return -7.9% pullback to $362.76 despite uniformly +1.00 news sentiment — creates entry asymmetry
Q3'24 EPS $5.06 vs Q1'24 $5.75 shows mild sequential softening, capping upside conviction

TRV.rationale: TRV trades at a near-cycle-low PE of 12.2x while ROE holds at 16.4% and Q3 earnings rebounded sharply from Q2 catastrophe losses, making the risk-adjusted reward attractive at the recent pullback.
